desc: DAG expansion protocol — adversarial hardening: spec-first bugs, property tests, consumer validation

init.desc: Library core + seed tests + self-referential roadmap + expansion skill

reorient.desc: Session entry gate: run boot.ts, verify orientation, confirm position, choose mode

adv-reconcile.desc: Adversarial spec: reconcile gap.missing = unmet consumes only, not surplus produces

adv-orient.desc: Adversarial spec: orient empty-produces stalls permanently — specify correct behavior

adv-property.desc: Property-based: for all valid graphs, order()→orient() consistent, check()→verify() agree

adv-types.desc: Type-level: invalid dep refs, id/key mismatch, unknown nodes are tsc errors

consumer-integration.desc: Consumer smoke test: install from path, write minimal roadmap.ts, orient() from real filesystem

phase-1-term.desc: Phase 1 complete: adversarially hardened protocol core (bugs fixed, contracts proven)

merge-spec.desc: Spec: merge(g1, g2, connections) combines DAGs at reconcile() join points — init/term unification strategy

adv-merge.desc: Adversarial spec: merge() preserves structure (no cycles), unifies nodes correctly, consumes satisfied

merge-impl.desc: Implement merge(g1, g2): validate inputs, reconcile(), add structural edges, define() + verify() merged graph

phase-2-term.desc: Phase 2 complete: DAG merge operations enable recursive expansion + multi-repo coordination

branch-spec.desc: Spec: branch(g, from) extracts subgraph from node to term, creates variant DAG for parallel development

adv-branch.desc: Adversarial spec: branch() preserves structure (acyclic), includes all reachable nodes to term, consumes satisfied

branch-impl.desc: Implement branch(g, from): extract subgraph, set new init/term, validate via define() + verify()

phase-3-term.desc: Phase 3 complete: branch operations enable parallel development + variant exploration

skill-finalize.desc: Finalize SKILL.md: protocol spec + merge/branch examples, expansion workflow

readme-write.desc: Write README.md: what/why/how, 3+ end-to-end examples, installation, API reference

example-create.desc: Create real consumer example: example/simple-project-roadmap.ts + integration test

release-prepare.desc: Add CHANGELOG.md, update package.json version to 0.2.0, prepare npm publish

v0.2.0-term.desc: v0.2.0 ready: published npm package, documented API, real consumer examples

spec-system.desc: Formalize adversarial spec system: when/how/why, integration with implementation

briefing-files.desc: Create .briefing.json per node: what to build, which files matter, pattern to follow

test-org-guide.desc: Test organization guide: how to read adv-* suites progressively, pattern matching

condense-docs.desc: Refactor SKILL.md + README for reference density (60 lines each, no marketing prose)

phase-4.5-term.desc: Phase 4.5 complete: governance documentation, formalized spec system, node briefings, agent autonomy

git-state-spec.desc: Spec: git-state.json schema — phase annotation, branch, head commit, dirty files

git-state-impl.desc: Implement: post-commit hook + session-start hook → write .regent/git-state.json

git-state-orient.desc: Extend orient() to read .regent/git-state.json cache (O(1) vs O(N) git ops)

bootstrap-gen-spec.desc: Spec: consumer bootstrap template generation — minimal roadmap.ts + boot harness

bootstrap-gen-impl.desc: Implement: generate consumer-bootstrap.ts from roadmap.ts definition

bootstrap-test.desc: Test: generated bootstrap runs orient(), consumes/produces correct, deps link correctly

multi-repo-pattern.desc: Doc + example: merge(fusion_roadmap, cockpit_roadmap, ...) multi-repo coordination

modify-spec.desc: Spec: goal deletion + replanning — analyze(), modify(g, nodeId, delete), decision logging

adv-modify.desc: Adversarial spec: modify() preserves graph validity, analyze() shows impact, skip action tracked

atomic-modify-design.desc: Spec: atomic modifications via git commits — modifyAndCommit(), concurrent agent safety

adv-atomic-modify.desc: Adversarial spec: modifyAndCommit() atomically persists, concurrent agents see committed state

phase-5-term.desc: Phase 5 complete: agent autonomy — O(1) orientation, bootstrap template, replanning + atomic commits

checkpoint-spec.desc: Spec: checkpoint/restore session state — node ID, remaining, artifacts metadata

audit-spec.desc: Spec: immutable audit trail — .boot/audit.jsonl, fields: timestamp/nodeId/executor/evidence

audit-impl.desc: Implement: audit(nodeId, executor, evidence) → append to audit.jsonl, validate completions

regent-integration.desc: Regent integration: roadmap-aware agent template, orient() on boot, position in audit

phase-6-term.desc: Phase 6 complete: governance layer — checkpoint/restore, audit trails, regent integration enabled

version-spec.desc: Spec: DAG versioning + protocol version tracking

version-migrations.desc: Implement: version compatibility checker + DAG migrations (0.1→0.2, 0.2→0.3)

version-validation.desc: Extend define() to validate version compatibility on DAG load

phase-7-term.desc: Phase 7 complete: versioning + consumer DAG migration

project-metadata-schema.desc: Spec: .roadmap.json schema — init/term artifacts, project type, manual phases

project-type-detector.desc: Implement: detect project type (TypeScript/Node/React/Python/Go/etc) from package.json + heuristics

build-process-discoverer.desc: Implement: infer build command from package.json scripts + heuristics, detect artifacts

dependency-resolver.desc: Implement: discover multi-repo dependencies, detect which repos must build first

auto-bootstrap-command.desc: Implement: unified "roadmap integrate" command — auto-detect metadata, generate, validate, boot

phase-8-term.desc: Phase 8 complete: discovery + auto-integration — agents can integrate autonomously

agent-bootstrap-spec.desc: Spec: regent agent template with sealed APIs — getBrief, checkpoint, advance

error-guidance-spec.desc: Spec: compilation error → guidance loop — agents learn from errors

agent-executor-impl.desc: Implement: regent executor agent skeleton — boots, calls getBrief, executes node

fusion-integration.desc: Real project: fusion roadmap + executor agent — end-to-end test

cockpit-integration.desc: Real project: cockpit roadmap + executor agent — validate multi-project pattern

phase-9-term.desc: Phase 9 complete: regent integration + real project adoption — agents autonomous

api-audit.desc: Audit: measure API surface, identify unused exports, tree-shaking opportunities

sub-entry-points-spec.desc: Spec: split index.ts into sub-entry-points (recovery, validation, versioning)

api-refactor.desc: Refactor: move optional modules to sub-entry-points

package-exports-update.desc: Update: package.json exports field with new entry points

api-test-migration.desc: Test: update imports to use correct sub-entry-points, verify tree-shaking

phase-10-term.desc: Phase 10 complete: API optimized, sub-entry-points, tree-shaking ready

adoption-scenario-setup.desc: Setup: Create test harnesses for 10 adoption scenarios (template, metrics collector, survey)

survey-analysis.desc: Analyze: Aggregate metrics across 10 scenarios, produce adoption-survey-results.md with findings

release-readiness-assessment.desc: Assess: Review adoption results, verify success criteria, make GO/NO-GO release decision

phase-11-term.desc: Phase 11 complete: Adoption-verified release-ready (10 scenarios, survey complete, GO decision)

integrate-gen-spec.desc: Design: roadmap.ts generation strategy (bootstrap template vs. full generation)

integrate-gen-impl.desc: Implementation: Generate roadmap.ts from ProjectMetadata + buildProcess, validate DAG

integrate-cli.desc: CLI entrypoint: "roadmap integrate" command with --dry-run support

integrate-test.desc: Comprehensive testing: End-to-end integration tests (3+ real project patterns)

integrate-docs.desc: Documentation: Adoption guide for external projects + CLI walkthrough

phase-12-term.desc: Phase 12 complete: External adoption enablement (CLI ready, adoption guide complete)

docs-restructure.desc: Move dev history docs to docs/archive/, keep only README/CHANGELOG/PROTOCOL/SKILL at root

api-surface-docs.desc: Export map in README (all 6 entry points incl. roadmap/agent), module map, types-at-a-glance, orient↔orientCached signpost

predicate-builders.desc: Curried exists predicates: fileExists(root), gitArtifactExists(root), compound(...preds)

parallel-order.desc: parallelOrder(g) → string[][] — batches of mutually independent nodes for concurrent execution

error-model.desc: RoadmapError class: typed codes (POSITION_MISMATCH, CONTRACT_VIOLATION, ...) + fix field + entry point

cli-binary.desc: bin/roadmap CLI: orient, advance, describe, validate, expand, branch, merge subcommands. JSON stdout. expand runs .ts scripts + validates + commits. branch/merge operate on git branches via protocol.ts branch()/merge(). package.json bin entry.

phase-13-term.desc: Phase 13 complete: Consumption surface (CLI, predicates, parallelOrder, errors, clean docs, file headers, CLAUDE.md)

term.desc: v0.5.0-consumption-ready: All phases complete, CLI binary ships, clean API surface

file-headers.desc: Structured @module/@exports/@types/@entry headers in all src/ files. Enables grep-based API discovery.

repo-cleanup.desc: Remove stale .roadmap/ expansion scripts, tests/adoption/ scaffolding, dead artifacts from completed phases

claude-md.desc: Update .claude/CLAUDE.md for consumer LLMs: module map, export table, type signatures, usage examples
